t_ch: 可以试试安心住借贷呀。
t_en: You can try taking out a safe loan.
I'm taller than the base.
But I can still reach the ball in the middle.
I have the high ground!
Why is that suitcase moving?
Probably because it has a Pepeshi person inside.
Just come out already!
Smuggling is illegal!
They said in the fan group that they're already here.
So are they here or not...
You're really popular in the dream.
Does that count as being a big celebrity?
Hmm? Why wouldn't it?

t_ch: 在梦里遇到了喜欢的人。
t_en: I met someone I like in the dream.
But I wasn't bold enough to say hello to her...
Maybe I can meet her again tonight.
Don't talk while standing over me!
That's really rude. Don't cha know!
We'll complain about you!
Umm...
The hotel keycard... Where did I put the hotel keycard?
The peach flavor is gorgeous!
I prefer the lemon one instead.
Do you want to lend me yours to try?
Nope.
It's easy to put on weight with sugary soda.
I should drink less...
You can go for a run inside the Spheroid.
Should I ask for more medicine?
If I keep being unable to sleep...
Wouldn't the room fee be wasted?
That person seems really familiar.
Aren't they from a movie?
Get their autograph first and ask questions later!
I wish I were a little bit taller...
What you think is what you will get.
How nice, a serene evening...
A shame to have run into public displays of affection.
You can shuffle over a tad.
What's up, darling?
I'm... a little cold.
Give me... give me some money now...
I want to be happy! I want to spend money!
Bro, are you feeling okay?
I feel really high right now!
Darling, look!
This is an Elegantrix sports car — how cool!
Hmph, so what?

t_ch: 跟我的帝彼亚有啥区别？
t_en: How is it any different from my Bionyx?
It's Robin's concert!
Let's go watch it together!
Such a popular celebrity...
I don't think we'll be able to get our hands on any tickets...

t_ch: 我好喜欢她在舞台上的样子，简直会发光。
t_en: I love the way she looks up on stage. She positively glows.

t_ch: 这张海报拍得也好棒，看她的头发，她的表情！啊，我要神魂颠倒了~
t_en: This poster is amazing! Look at her hair and her expression! Ah, I'm gonna fall head over heels~

t_ch: 我用手机看了下，票已经卖光了。
t_en: I checked on my phone. The tickets have already sold out.
Ah...
Do you want...

t_ch: 陪我看钟表小子大电影？
t_en: ...to watch the Clockie blockbuster with me?
So, we're just watching a movie, that's it?
What else?
SoulGlad doesn't rot your teeth...
Grandpa and grandma both love it...

t_ch: 这都多少年前的广告了？
t_en: That advert is how many years old?
So many unsold newspapers left...
Looks like they won't be sold.
Wait for the train...
It'll take you far, far away...

t_ch: 你这词从电影里学的吧？
t_en: Did you learn these lines from a movie?
I stayed in the dream for a fortnight...
What happened out here during this time...?
Our papers have been selling well...
We're the only newspaper agency in the dream.
Also, remember...

t_ch: 记住了，不准报道坏事。不然读者宁愿去看电视新闻也不看咱们的报纸了。
t_en: Remember, no negative news allowed. Otherwise, readers would rather watch TV news than read our newspaper.

t_ch: 可是…报社最重要的就是传播真相啊。
t_en: But... the most important thing a newspaper does is disseminate the truth.

t_ch: 不，报社最重要的是搞清楚什么能说，什么不能……
t_en: No, what's most important for a newspaper is to figure out what can and can't be said...

t_ch: 大家进入美梦，本就是为了享受生活，何必给他们添堵呢？
t_en: Everyone enters the dream to enjoy life, so why deliberately give them trouble?

t_ch: 读者可是我们的衣食父母，小心一点总没错的。
t_en: Our readers pay our bills. No harm in being careful.
Hey, have you heard the news?

t_ch: 苜蓿草的大人物要来视察了。
t_en: The big shot from the Alfalfa Family is coming to perform an inspection.
Old Oti? He already arrived yesterday.

t_ch: 哎，你听说了吗？苜蓿草家系的大人物要来视察了。
t_en: Hey, did you hear? The big shot from the Alfalfa Family is coming to perform an inspection.

t_ch: 老奥帝？那个皮皮西老头？哈，他昨天就来了，不过是来提车的。
t_en: Old Oti, the ancient Pepeshi fellow? Ha, he already arrived yesterday, but he's here to pick up the car.

t_ch: 加长型「侯王之剑」，全梦境限量三辆——他大手一挥就是三十亿苜蓿币，直接全款拿下，眼睛都没眨！
t_en: There are only three stretched "The Prince's Sword" vehicles in the whole dreamscape — he tossed out 3 billion Alfalfa credits to pay in cash up front without so much as blinking!

t_ch: 唉…就算在梦里，有的有钱人也比其他有钱人更有钱哪。
t_en: *sigh*... Even in the dream, some rich people are richer than other rich people.
That's enough money for the Pershing, then...

t_ch: 还是说，咬咬牙上新款「巴顿」？
t_en: Or should I bite the bullet and get the new Patton?
*Sigh* So hard to choose...

t_ch: 我都说了，这里什么梦都有…
t_en: I told you, there's every kind of dream in here...

t_ch: 我保证！我亲自体验过了！
t_en: I promise! I've experienced it myself!
You mean, Akivili's dream?

t_ch: 当然！梦里他还在和毛绒玩具说话呢！
t_en: Of course! In that dream, he was talking with a plush toy!
...Incomprehensible.
The number one luxury store across the whole dreamscape...
If it's not expensive, then you can have it for free!
Got anything cheap?
If you don't have money, why are you shopping for luxuries?

t_ch: 「斯登家族」新款腕表现已面世。
t_en: A new model of wristwatch by the "Sten Family" has just hit the market.
The starting price for "Dame Kosovec" is <unbreak>18.68</unbreak> million.

t_ch: 欢迎到店垂询产品详情。
t_en: Welcome to our store. You can ask about anything.
Do you have any <unbreak>10</unbreak>-year-old SoulGlads?
Yes, but it's not for sale.
What about four-leaf clover salads?
Yes, but it's not for sale.
If you don't sell anything, what's the point of opening a store!?
What's the point of good school grades?
My classmates...
None of them are doing as well as I am!

t_ch: 我跟你说啊，学历是天下最没用的东西……
t_en: I'm telling you, school grades are the biggest scam in the world...

t_ch: 你看我那群同学，各个上的都是名校，有什么用？现在有钱来匹诺康尼消费的还不是只有我？
t_en: Just look at my classmates. They all went to a famous school. For what? Who's the only one who can afford to vacation in Penacony right now? Me.

t_ch: 那你是怎么赚到钱的呢？
t_en: So, how did you earn your money?

t_ch: 这还不简单？我没考上好学校，干脆就去玩说唱了。
t_en: Easy! I didn't make it into any famous school, so I just started doing rap.

t_ch: 现在看来，这是少走了一百五十年弯路啊！
t_en: Looking back now, it seems like I saved <unbreak>150</unbreak> years in my life!
It took me so much work to save up for a vacation...
Only to bump into a colleague here!
Yeah, what rotten luck...

t_ch: …碰见同事也就算了，怎么还是那个罗格斯啊！
t_en: ...It's bad enough bumping into a colleague. What's worse, it turned out to be that Rutgers!

t_ch: 是啊是啊，那个阴阳怪气的家伙！我敢说，整个筑材物流部都没有比他更恶心的人了！
t_en: Yes, yes — that sarcastic guy! I dare say there isn't anyone more annoying than him in the entire Building Material Logistics Department!

t_ch: 啊啊啊，气死我了！凭什么我花了大价钱来度假还要碰上这种糟心事……
t_en: Ahhh, I'm livid! What am I doing spending all this money on a vacation, just to meet this darn annoyance...
If I were to run in my dream.
Could I lose weight?
Of course not.
So that's just pure suffering, no?
I nearly got smashed by a Spheroid today.
It's pretty hard to notice you.
Because there was an Intellitron across the street.
Who put a green light on their body.

t_ch: 朋友，车站人流量大，注意安全。
t_en: My friend, there are lots of people around the station. Stay safe.
You look utterly clueless...
U—Understand what?
Let's go. I'll show you something good to see...
There are three unavoidable things in life:
Eating, dreaming, and queuing up...
It's a bit chilly and damp down here.
We should ask The Family to fix that.
This damp will affect my joints...
This is a dream. Don't worry about it.
How is it not even Thursday yet...
I'm really craving some half-price Clockie Pizza...
Er... Is there a Zero-Sugar SoulGlad?
You drink zero-sugar even in your dream!?
Give him a kid's meal.
Kid!? You're the kid!
Today is a lucky day.
Not enough credits left... Where do I recharge?
Please read the instructions on how to use the facilities.
Please do not damage the entertainment facilities.
Gorgeous music!

t_ch: 身体不自觉就扭起来了！
t_en: My body is moving instinctively!
Now this is how the Pepeshi dance!
I'm feeling dizzy with the twirls...
Can you do a quake dance?
Sorry, I can't...
I'm a big shot!
I raise my hand and the minimum amount I move would be a million!
Would you like to dance together?
No thanks.
Why is there only SoulGlad...
I want to drink Kapo-Kali!
Me! Today!
Must! Win!
The big prize!
If I don't win something soon...
All my precious coins would be gone...
Who told me this has a guarantee system?
You ought to be careful.
It's easy to mess up here.
Understood, ma'am.
Going on a trip is tiring.
Why isn't there...
A dream where I can just lie flat at home?
I really love Clockie.

t_ch: 它就是我们智械的英雄！
t_en: It is a hero for us Intellitrons!
Uhm... It doesn't count as an inorganic lifeform, right?
Excuse me! I need to take a photo.
Remember to turn on the filter.
There aren't many tourists here.
Is Clockie losing popularity?

t_ch: 我追逐着梦想来到这里。
t_en: I came here to pursue my dream.
And it's finally before my eyes...
The theater is gorgeous.
Is this the hallowed ground of the arts?
The music is pleasing to the ear too.
How I wish to stay here forever.
I used to be a tenor.
And I had performed in that theater too.
Then why did you leave?
The other members went off to form an idol group.
Triple Dreamjolt Troupe.

t_ch: 三个猎犬带一个隐夜鸫。
t_en: Three Bloodhounds with a Hermit Thrush.
Four robins. Checkmate!
Haha. Exactly what I want to see!
The Watchmaker and Death. Big checkmate!
Huh!? What kind of card table luck is this...
These prints... are way too small!
I can't read them at all...
Whoa. It's squirting.
Are you referring to that building?
I'm referring to the soda in your hands.
Whoa!
What's your favorite flavor?
Diesel flavor. I like it rich and thick.
Forget I said anything...
A circular billiard table? That's new.

t_ch: 就不能适配球桌高度嘛？
t_en: But can't you adjust the height of the table to suit the user?
The area ahead hasn't been built yet.

t_ch: 前方是施工区，有怪物出没。你一定要过去的话…家族可不负责。
t_en: The area ahead is still under construction, and there are monsters roaming around. If you insist on going there... The Family will not be responsible for your safety.
No visitors allowed! Leave!
How can that be done...
What's her request this time?
It's a long story...

t_ch: 这种需求怎么可能实现嘛，我们又没有那么多模型资源…
t_en: How can her request ever be fulfilled? It's not like we have that many model resources...

t_ch: 是科琳？她又提什么怪点子了？
t_en: Is it Colleen? What weird idea does she have again?

t_ch: 她说我们现在的梦境都太单调了，应该加点宇宙大战、爱恨情仇之类的戏码…这是她写的策划案。
t_en: She said that our current dreamscapes are too mundane, and we should include dramas like a galactic battle or some lovers-to-enemies soap opera... Here's her proposal document.

t_ch: …你告诉她，梦里不能有悲剧故事，也不能出现打打杀杀。
t_en: ...Tell her there mustn't be any tragedy or violence in dreams.

t_ch: 如果宾客受到的情感冲击太过强烈，搞不好就直接从梦中醒来了。
t_en: If the guests become too agitated or emotional, they might even wake up from the dream.
Dreams are meant to be chaotic.
If you create dreams based on a blueprint...
Are they still considered dreams?
Miss Claudia!
Is she here to get references?
Shh! Keep your voice down!
Don't let her find us!
Do even you get art?
If I knew art...
...Do you think I'll still be here working as a security guard?
A little more to the left...
...No, no, that's too much. A little to the right.
Yes, now move it a little higher...

t_ch: 啧…效果不好，还是再往下点吧。
t_en: Tsk... No good. I think it's better to move it lower.
...Are you done yet?
What a cool design concept!

t_ch: 不愧是大名鼎鼎的班尼！
t_en: This is indeed a masterpiece by the great Benny!
Let's make dreams great again!

t_ch: 班尼先生最厉害的项目…
t_en: Mr. Benny's best work...
It's Benny's Castle, no?
No... It's got to be Apocalyptic Benny...
Art is sacred and speculative...
Are you done?
If you are, then hurry and get back to work.

t_ch: 我坚信，我们的筑梦艺术是当代社交和亲密关系的一种体现；这是一种无关乎外部世界他者的、完全纯粹的精神活动，并不以现实——我是说梦境——的客观变化为转移……
t_en: I firmly believe that our art of dream-building is an expression of contemporary socialization and intimacy. It is purely a mental activity that has nothing to do with others in the external world, and is not subject to objective changes in reality — I mean, the dreamscape...

t_ch: 在我看来，如今的筑梦艺术正在被一种无比荒谬、简单且粗糙的方式构建。就像潜藏在我们意识深层中的、原始的社会需求——换言之，亲密关系——被一种残忍又暴力的方式异化、统治，进而摧毁……
t_en: It seems to me that the art of dream-building today is being constructed in an incredibly absurd, simple, and crude way. It's as if our primal social need — in other words, intimate relationships — that lurks in the depths of our consciousness is being alienated, dominated, and destroyed in a cruel and violent way...

t_ch: 说完了吗？说完了就赶紧开工。
t_en: Are you done? If you are, then hurry and get back to work.
Where does art come from?
The urge of wanting to drink iced soda.
My mind is empty...
I can't think of any good ideas.
Can we just give up?
I can't do this job anymore!

t_ch: 我会帮您向家族反映的。
t_en: I'll help you pass this feedback to The Family.

t_ch: 这不让改，那不让碰…再这样下去，我看这活儿是没法干了。
t_en: I can't change this, and I can't touch that... If this keeps on, there's no way I can work.

t_ch: 您别激动，我会把您的意见向家族反映的。
t_en: Calm down. I'll pass your feedback to The Family.

t_ch: 只是，您说要在天空上开个大洞…这可能不太好办啊。
t_en: But you mentioned making a big hole in the sky... That might be difficult.

t_ch: 你懂什么？不开洞，怎么让苏乐达糖浆像瀑布一样从天而降？
t_en: What do you know? Without making a hole, how can I let SoulGlad syrup fall from the sky like a waterfall?

t_ch: 就是因为有你这种喜欢指手画脚的家伙，艺术才会屡遭亵渎！
t_en: Art is often treated with disrespect because of bossy people like you who like to criticize ideas!
Building a dream is so difficult nowadays...
They want it to be exciting yet romantic...
It's hard to please the clients...
How imprudent!
Who are these people?
The decadence!
This is the way...
Doesn't feel right...
Is there enough time left...

t_ch: 怎么专挑「美梦剧团」下手…
t_en: Why did they only target the Sweet Dreams Troupe?
They are a pervert, aren't they?

t_ch: 反正正常人干不出这事…
t_en: Seriously, no sane person would do this...
Like I said, we should do it that way...
But you did nothing in the end!
Have you figured out what you want to be in your dream?
I want to be an adorable girl.
Anything is possible within a dream.
While I have nothing in reality.
The cost of rooms just keeps going up...
Can't even catch a break in my dreams.
How odd... No available rooms?
But my phone says there are rooms available.
Why is it late again...?
The rooms are so darn expensive!
The keycard... Where did I put my keycard?
People from Planet Screwllum never boast...
...A moment of Intellitron charming?
Penacony, a wonderland where legends gather...
And they are all living legends.
The IPC is pushing again...
Just be happy if you want to enter the dream.
Wow, this sports car is so cool!
It's okay to touch it, I guess?
Be careful with it!
I'm counting on it in reality!
Please rest assured. I will bring it back to the hotel for you.
I've bought you whole sets of trendy toys!
I've bought all the clothes in the fashion store for you!

t_ch: 我为你包下了整个餐厅！
t_en: I've booked the entire restaurant for you!
Sorry, but I'm not interested in relationships.
We're in a dream. Come on...

t_ch: 别惦记你的现实女友了！
t_en: Just forget about your girlfriend in reality!
But I just can't stop thinking about her...
SoulGlad Power is awesome!
Get refueled with SoulGlad and be on the road immediately!
Epochal SoulGlad! Limited-time offer!
Grab a can for yourself now!
This tastes weird...
They better not be using some fake recipe...
Spending money feels so good!
What!? You bought so much stuff?
Stop jumping! You might fall...
Well, you can't really fall to your death in a dream anyway!
I want to fly too!
I want to become SoulGlad, too!
One more time!
Babe, check out this dress...
I was thinking...
You. You're not thinking.
I love you so much...
...O, beautiful opera house!
I would feel soulless without you...
This one is just pathetic...
Making money isn't easy...
How about we just rob an ATM...?
I recommend you to calm down.
Welcome! Come on in and take a look?
We've got everything here...
Bottoms up! To our friendship!
Let's have another round! To our companionship!
Ah... I'm feeling dizzy...
Maybe dreaming isn't my thing after all...
Who would eat zero-calorie snacks in a dream, seriously!?
Probably cos of body image anxiety, I guess...
Say, if we could get a real treasure chest in the dream...
Ain't we gonna get mega rich?
You can't expect to find gold at the end of every rainbow.
Interested in Spheroid Race?
So beautiful...
...I'll take another look.
Do you have talking ice cream cones?
Sorry, but we actually don't.
So, do you have SoulGlad-flavor ice cream cones?
We can definitely have that.
How come no one's parking?
Probably a height issue, I guess...
It's not like I'm not trying...
The location is just terrible...
You've been in The Family for so long...
Have you forgotten who you are?
It's been ten years, and then another ten years...
If only someone would lend me some money...
I really don't want to leave the Dreamscape...
Are you going or what...?
Th—There's so much traffic here!
Look, so many flying cars!
Hmph, what's the big deal?
The water looks pretty clear...
How about we go for a swim?
..."One More Bottle"? Again?
All these bottles are gonna make me puke!
The "water" flowing in here... is SoulGlad?
Of course not. Look at its color.
Ah, my dear Robin...
I just can't get enough of you...
Good, good, everything is thriving.
Young folks can be trusted.
Take this!
Ah, so cool!
Watch this!
Ah, so sweet!
Why isn't the line moving...?
It's taking forever to buy SoulGlad!
You'll find all sorts of dreams here...
I've experienced them myself!
Wait, they have Akivili's dream?
Yeah! And he even talks elephant language!
...Inscrutable.
Finally, I've got enough money to buy Pershing...
Perhaps getting the latest of the Patton series?
*Sigh* So hard to choose...
What a cool car! It's a new model, right?
What's its name, by the way?
Ah, I can't afford it anyway...
The new watch just hit the market...
It's priced at <unbreak>18.68</unbreak> million.
Please feel free to visit our store for more details.
I heard the food there is hella expensive...
Can't we just try it once? Please...
I'm starving! I want a Floatdisc Burger!
Then I'll go for a Potato Fries Sundae.
Epochal SoulGlad! Only for a limited period of time!
Don't miss out!
You're not tricking me, right?
Definitely!
Grady Films has released a new movie...
You're THAT into horror movies?
Buy popcorn and get a free movie ticket!
Sounds great! Can I really get a free ticket?
Do you have movies about Robin?
Why the heck can't I get through?

t_ch: 这面墙不是可以穿过吗？
t_en: Isn't this wall supposed to be passable or what?
Where do we head to next?
I've heard Aideen Park is a great place to go.
I want to drink ten bottles of SoulGlad!
Hold on, let me beautify the photos first...
Triple Dreamjolt Troupe.
Three Bloodhounds, with a Hermit Thrush.
Four robins. Checkmate!
Haha. Just the way I like it!
Red and black Watchmakers! Gotcha!
Huh!? Speaking of luck...
Give it to me! It's my turn now!
Not so fast! I haven't had enough yet!
Finally, an unblocked path!
So many people out here buying gifts, ...
Making deliveries isn't a cakewalk...
Why did I get rejected...?
Want some desserts?
Ice cream! Ice cream!
Wishing you a great night.
Welcome to Aideen Park.
I want to ride the roller coaster so bad...
Let's have some SoulGlad first.
I'm way too ordinary...
Look on the bright side, my friend...
True ordinary folks can't get into the Dreamscape.
This place is just used to play video games...
Why don't they throw a party here?
If you're up for it...
We can start dancing right now.
Look, I'm as tall as you are now!
You stand on the ground and take another look, huh?
Despite all the restaurants around here...
We offer the most affordable foods.
Do you have hygienic issues...?
Come on, you can't really get an upset stomach in your dream.
Just look around. This place is so lost in pleasure.
We definitely can't afford anything here...
What a beautiful song...
Can't believe a machine can play like this...
Intellitron have souls too.
May I buy you a drink?
Drinking SoulGlad isn't really my thing...
Have a mug of strawberry-flavored machine oil.
It doesn't hit as hard as Kapo-Kali...
I prefer SoulGlad myself.
Sometimes I feel like...
It's just nice to sit back and watch the water.
Let your life slow down for a while.
Someday...
I'll be at the peak of the Dreamscape, too!
Yeah, you'll definitely get there!
Heard it's not the healthiest thing...
It's bad for your health and figure.
We're in a dream. Come on...
Heh, I'm after just the unhealthy ones.
Foolish bets lead to empty pockets...
Why is it cursing!?
Such a huge capsule machine...
Think about its structure and weight...

t_ch: 果然只在梦里才行得通。
t_en: It can probably only exist in dreams.
I'm starving. I need some popcorn ASAP!
Come on, how can you be hungry in a dream?
If this phone peeks into dreams...
Does that mean when I'm sleeping...
Others can peek into MY dreams too?
I got the tickets for Robin's concert!
Wonderful!
What should I stuff in it...?
A bunch of balloons?
Nah, they won't pop or scare anyone.
How about... a spring-loaded puppet?
Sounds good. That's the one.
Making money is getting tougher these days...
Any great ideas?
How about selling height-increase shoe insoles for Pepeshi?
I want to drink SoulGlad!
Give me some, quickly!
This is exclusive to vehicles...
So, this is Aideen Park...
I wonder if I have enough tokens...
Do I need a license to drive a Spheroid?
